campaign.title: The Bell Beneath Ashford
campaign.public_lore: Ashford is a mining town where the old chapel bell has begun ringing underground.
campaign.dm_secrets: The bell is a planar anchor hidden beneath the chapel crypt.

location.name: Old Chapel
location.public_description: A cracked chapel with a silent bronze bell and a sealed stairway.
location.dm_notes: The sealed stairway leads to the crypt anchor.

npc.name: Mira Voss
npc.public_description: A careful woman trying to keep Ashford calm.
npc.dm_secret: She hears the bell in her dreams.

clue.title: Ash on the Bell Rope
clue.public_text: The bell rope is dusted with black ash that smells faintly of sulfur.
clue.dm_secret: The ash came from the lower crypt.

quest.title: Find the Source of the Bell
quest.summary: Investigate why the chapel bell rings from below ground.

intro: A bronze bell hangs above a sealed stairway. The bell rope is stained with black dust.
Try actions like 'look around', 'inspect rope', 'open stairway', 'log', or 'quit'.
text.look: The chapel is cold. The pews are empty, the altar is cracked, and the bell rope moves without wind.
text.inspect_first: You examine the bell rope. Black ash clings to your glove.
text.inspect_success: You notice the ash trail leading under the sealed stairway. Something below is warm.
text.inspect_failure: You find the ash, but its source is unclear.
text.inspect_repeat: You already found the black ash on the rope.
text.stairway_locked: The stairway seal does not move. The bell rope may hold a clue.
text.stairway_open: The seal grinds open. Warm air rises from the crypt, carrying the sound of a distant bell.
text.unknown: The current prototype does not know how to resolve that yet.
